paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93 as of 2026-07-16, with a change of -5.12% from the prior close and -31.52% over a window of 20 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include Fermi facing governance questions and a director resigning over disputes about board transparency and governance. Another article mentions Fermi cofounder Toby Neugebauer stating that the market clearly wants cooperation between him and the company's board. All of these articles were published on 2026-07-16 by sources including Yahoo Finance and Stocktwits.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form on 2026-07-15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form on 2026-07-13 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings, with a total of 25 filings in the feed.
